purpose: Checks the bolt parts and highlights the bolts and parts that bolt goes through a single part only.

Content: Critical to bolt the parts in the model. Checking is time consuming and manual process. Sometimes, user might miss the parts to be bolted together. This will lead to drilling at the site and thereby delay in erection. With this tool, it can be identified at the initial stage itself. Option is also given to ignore the parts by adding any text in Bolt Comment.

download_process: Once You purchase the tool, a link will be sent to your mail to download.
installation_process: Double click on the installation Package
System will show installed Tekla Versions on your system
Choose the version(s) to be installed.
Close the Application. (Do not Delete the File)
It will be queued for the installation when Tekla is open next time.
Application will be installed before opening the software.
Search for Bolt Check  under Application and Components.
Let the Application automate the manual process
